title: taraxacum peralatum
intro: Taraxacum peralatum, also known as the dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum peralatum include improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in the treatment of liver and kidney disorders. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves, roots, and flowers can be used in herbal preparations to support overall health and well-being.
